title: iris pumila var. tristis
intro: Iris pumila var. tristis, also known as Dwarf Iris or Alpine Iris, is a small, delicate species of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Iris pumila var. tristis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and soothe digestive issues, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
